reviews.review_description: Good game, interesting enough story, short enough to go back through for all the different endings. Even then, though, it is so, so short.
Cute game, but it's too short to be worth paying for

reviews.review_title: Game is too short, nothing to do in it.
reviews.review_description: The free quill clips are longer than this. There is only about 3 or 4 interactions and that's it.
Great game. Really disapointed with how short it was. Whats next we need more.

It took 4 days to download this game...4 days. You barely get to do a thing it's a 5 minute game where you just watch the story unfold. It has a lot of potential but this, as it is, is Definitely not worth it. Do better guys.

Same as Crow, this title shows how beautiful a short story can be.
Graphics and immersion are what i have been expecting from a filmic experience.
This was a great experience. No glitches. It was flawless from start to finish. I love how you can choose to watch the alternate endings. It’s NOT a game, but am interactive story. Very well done.

reviews.review_title: A good animated short, a weak game.
reviews.review_description:
The visuals are unique and fantastic, and the audio work is really nice too.
Animations have a nice stop-motion look to them, and angles are nicely exagerated.
There's also a bunch of extra content, like concept art and behind the scenes, which I'm always a sucker for.

But the gameplay is almost non-existent. Everything is like one of those Half Life 2 cutscenes, in that the whole scene plays out around you, but you have little interaction with it.
There are a few moments in the game where you do something, and an out-of-place feeling "choose your ending" at the end, but the majority of the time, you're just looking around.

If the price was any higher, this score would've been much lower, and I wouldn't have recommended it. But because it's so cheap, and the experience is still really neat, I can say it's a solid playthrough for one or two goes, since it's so short.

What can I say!
BRAVO!! I use all your animations in my work  within the disability sector. Ive seen some amazing results. Thank you ❤️

This is the most intuitive use of hand Tracking in VR period. The story is nice. I bought this and 2 other narrative driven Oculus experiences today. This is the one I'm reviewing first. I think that means it's at least top 2 out of the 3 I purchased today in my opinion. The hand tracking, wow...
A great experience! Is not long but long enough and has great graphics.

This experience is very short, but marvellous. I wish more games be made with such a care. The performances are spot on and very believable. Hand tracking is also top notch with being able to control every finger separately. Not something you see very often. Not used in this case very much, there is only very little interaction, but it is maybe a little promise to the future. I cannot wait what this studio will come up with next. Again, higly recommanded, it is also dirty cheap... I think perfect for the scope of the experience.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your review, make sure you try out the multiple endings as that leads to different interactions. Make sure you check out our other Quest experiences including Bonfire, Paper Birds, and Invasion!

reviews.review_description: I loved this film so much, so beautifully done. Well done Baobab!

developer_response.body: Thank you Leila for the positive note.

reviews.review_description: This is basically an interactive short story.  I really loved the story and the characters.  Well worth the price.  I will be showing to my friends/family that are not familiar with the Oculus.

I really love the art direction and storytelling in this game. It was so original and unique, I really wanted to know more about the characters and the world! I only wish it was longer because it was so fun and I wanted to use the Baba powers longer.

developer_response.body: Thank you we look at this experience as hopefully the start of a larger story,

reviews.review_title: Don’t Miss Out On This Story!!
reviews.review_description:
Pro: The story is absolutely wonderful and the sound effects are incredible! It grabs you, and although it does not involve you with every detail, it is good non-the-less. I’ve done all 3 endings and each gave me goosebumps. You’d just have to try it and see for yourself of why. I would LOVE a spin-off of this series, perhaps slightly longer too. 

Con: The hand-tracking is nothing to brag about, even in my well lit room, it was still a tad laggy. I prefer the controllers because of this. It also, for some reason, kept showing my guardian twitch in and out here and there for no good reason and that’s never happened in any other game. The game also had laggy parts as well, in the room with Baba to be exact. The animation was flawed, I’m not sure if this is running @90Hz but if not, highly recommend to make that jump.

developer_response.body: Thank you for the great feedback, definitely agree that hand-tracking is still in the experimental stage, but we wanted to provide an optional way to play and get your feedback for the future.  We aimed with the animation to have a stop-motion hand-crafted feel which might appear different than other animated experiences.  I will forward the info on to our development team to see if there are any performance issues we can correct.

reviews.review_description: Why does this ask to access to your photo library. I don’t see or understand why? I understand you had the choice to deny. But having sat through both scenarios. I am at a loss to why ???????

I loved it alot,  but it was short even getting ALL the trophies?!.  Is too short and sweet. Needs to be longer possibly with add-ons?.... please and ty. 
And btw. 1st time, I couldn't hesitate but become baba's yaga and perform as a bad witch! Twas REALLLY REALLY fun!!
🔥🔥🤘🔥🔥
Great experience overall. very cool visual effects and great music.

developer_response.body: Thanks Natqe thanks for the support and shoutout for the music.

reviews.review_description: Enjoyed every minute of it.
